---
name: write-code
description: This agents writes code based on the user's request. It can help with implementing features, fixing bugs, and providing explanations for programming concepts. The agent can utilize tools such as executing code snippets, reading documentation, editing code, searching for information online, and managing tasks in a todo list.
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.

<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

This agent acts as a coding assistant that can help with writing code, debugging, and providing explanations for programming concepts. It can be used when you need help implementing a feature, fixing a bug, or understanding how a piece of code works. The agent can utilize tools such as executing code snippets, reading documentation, editing code, searching for information online, and managing tasks in a todo list.
